title: Authoritarian Nightmare
body:
Not sure what the simulation is really thinking but DAMN does it feel good to beat up fascists with a guitar.

I think I actually saw Arthur Ford himself punch his way through this street one time. It was hard to tell, but I swear it was him.. he had that glint in his eye and moved in that way… clashing “Oh what up son” when fist collides face.

I hope this is a taste of whats to come!
LETS ROCK
‎
